## Summary

- What does this change do?
- Why is it needed?

## Changes

- Key implementation details
- Any schema, CLI, MCP, or skill-facing changes

## Validation

- Commands run
- Manual checks performed
- Anything not validated

## Compatibility Notes

- Breaking change: yes/no
- If yes, what should integrators update?

## Context

- Related issue(s)
- Follow-up work, if any
